assumptions.assumption: The core ledger system API will be available for real-time event streaming by project kick-off (Q3 2026).
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: The reconciliation engine cannot operate in real time; the initiative falls back to batch processing, partially negating OBJ-001.

assumptions.assumption: Operations team headcount remains stable during the transition — no planned reorganisation that would change analyst responsibilities.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Training and change management effort increases significantly; go-live date may slip by 4–6 weeks.

assumptions.assumption: The payments gateway will adopt the unified transaction ID schema agreed by IT Architecture without requiring a major gateway upgrade.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: A gateway upgrade adds 3–4 months to the timeline and requires a separate business case.
